title: Organizing Item View
excerpt: Both on CRM and Work Management, I’d like the ability to decide WHERE each column goes in the Item card/view, and not have it ordered based on column location on the board.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml: Both on CRM and Work Management, I’d like the ability to decide WHERE each column goes in the Item card/view, and not have it ordered based on column location on the board.
